text: I find myself on the threshold of discovery, standing outside a glass-walled room that seems to invite inquiry. The clinical lines, emergency signage, and humming overhead lights lend the space an aura of security and order. Yet, as I peer inside, I am drawn to the vivid, almost playful colors and bold lettering that greet me within—the promise of ideas growing, evolving, and being tested. Entering, I am met by thoughtful displays and screens alive with the written word, each offering a meditation on human ingenuity and our relationship with innovation. I feel quietly excited, as though I stand at the intersection of curiosity and creation.
